en.extract:
The Guadalcanal owl (Athene granti), also known as the Guadalcanal boobook is a small to medium-sized owl.  It is endemic to Guadalcanal.  It was formerly considered a subspecies of the Solomons boobook.

The '''Guadalcanal owl''' ('''''Athene granti'''''), also known as the '''Guadalcanal boobook''' is a small to medium-sized owl.  It is endemic to [[Guadalcanal]].  It was formerly considered a subspecies of the [[Solomons boobook]].<ref>{{Cite web|title=Species Updates – IOC World Bird List|url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/new/updates/species-updates/|access-date=2021-06-18|language=en-US}}</ref>
